backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing quotation management, project portfolio, reviews, chat system, admin user management, and blob storage for a printing services platform with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting production readiness, performance optimization, mobile app-like experience, and production environment configuration with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of frontend files including React Query hooks, pages, components, and utilities for quotations, reviews, projects, chat, admin management, and blob storage.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI components, charts, and sidebar elements using OKLCH color space.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Nellore Print Hub application with viewport configuration and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application router using TanStack Router, defining all routes for customer pages (home, services, gallery, testimonials, quotations) and admin pages (dashboard, quotations, projects, logo, chat, users) with layout and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Protected route component that verifies user authentication and admin permissions, displaying loading states or access denied messages with navigation options if unauthorized.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Mobile-optimized bottom navigation bar with haptic feedback, displaying Home, Services, Gallery, Reviews, and Chat buttons with active state highlighting and 44px minimum touch targets.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheet.tsx: A modal bottom sheet component that slides up from the bottom of the screen with optional title, close button, and scrollable content area. Prevents body scrolling when open.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheetSelec: A custom select input component that opens a BottomSheet with selectable options, showing a checkmark for the selected value and triggering haptic feedback on selection.
frontend/src/components/ChatWidget.tsx: A full-screen chat widget that collects user profile (name/email) on first use, displays chat history, and sends messages to the backend with haptic feedback and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component with sticky header, company logo, bottom navigation for customer pages, admin login button, chat widget integration, and responsive footer.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout with loading states and clears query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/NegotiationHisto: Displays a scrollable list of negotiation messages between customer and admin with sender avatars, timestamps, and message bubbles aligned by sender type.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: A modal dialog that prompts authenticated users without a profile to enter their name, email, and mobile number, preventing dismissal until completed.
frontend/src/components/PullToRefreshCon: A container component that implements pull-to-refresh functionality with touch event handling, visual feedback indicator, and smooth animations.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonCard.tsx: Provides animated skeleton loading placeholders for different content types (project, review, service, quotation) with shimmer effects.
frontend/src/components/SwipeContainer.t: A React component that wraps children in a swipeable container, applying touch event handlers and visual transform feedback based on swipe gestures using the useSwipeNavigation hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and initializing access control with admin tokens from URL parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: Provides a React Query hook to check if the current caller has admin privileges by calling the backend actor's isCallerAdmin method.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: Provides a mutation hook for verifying admin email/password credentials by hashing the password with SHA-256 and calling the backend's verifyAuthentication method.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminInvitations.t: Provides hooks for fetching admin invitations and inviting new admin users with SHA-256 hashed passwords, invalidating the invitation cache on successful mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useBiometricAuth.ts: Provides mutation hooks for biometric login and registration using WebAuthn, checking device support and handling credential creation/verification with the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useChat.ts: Provides React Query hooks for chat functionality including sending messages, fetching all messages, owner replies, and retrieving customer chat history with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useCompanyLogo.ts: Provides hooks for fetching and setting the company logo as an ExternalBlob, with automatic query invalidation after updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useDelivery.ts: Provides a mutation hook for calculating delivery fees based on distance using the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication context and provider for ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useNegotiation.ts: Provides a mutation hook for responding to quotation negotiations, invalidating related quotation queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useOfficeLocation.ts: Provides hooks for fetching and setting office location data with automatic cache invalidation after updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useProjects.ts: Provides comprehensive CRUD hooks for project management including fetching all projects, filtering by category, and add/edit/delete operations with 5-minute cache staleness.
frontend/src/hooks/usePullToRefresh.ts: Implements pull-to-refresh functionality with touch event handling, tracking pull distance and triggering refresh callbacks when threshold is exceeded.
Provides a mutation hook for handling quotation responses with status updates and optional messages, invalidating quotation caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotations.ts: React Query hooks for managing quotation requests including fetching all/user quotations, creating requests, adding details, and approving quotations with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationStatistic: Fetches quotation statistics (pending, accepted, rejected, negotiating counts) with 30-second stale time and automatic refetch interval for real-time updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useReviews.ts: React Query hooks for managing customer reviews including fetching all reviews, filtering by rating, and adding new reviews with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeNavigation.ts: Custom hook implementing touch-based swipe navigation between pages (home, services, gallery, testimonials) with configurable threshold and scroll prevention.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and saving the current user's profile with loading state management and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom print-industry-inspired color scheme (cyan/navy), dark mode support, mobile utilities (safe areas, scrollbar hiding), and shimmer animation for skeleton loaders.
frontend/src/lib/blobStorage.ts: Wrapper class for backend blob storage providing methods to create blobs from URLs or bytes, retrieve bytes/URLs, and track upload progress.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point setting up React Query client and Internet Identity provider context around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: About page showcasing Nellore Print Hub's mission, benefits (expert design, modern technology, customer focus), and commitment values with hero section and feature cards.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: Admin-only dashboard page protected by AdminGuard showing quotation statistics in four cards (pending, accepted, rejected, negotiating) with icons and color coding. Displays total counts and quick stats summary using the quotation statistics hook.
Admin login page with email/password authentication and optional biometric (WebAuthn) login. Redirects to admin dashboard on successful authentication.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminUserManage: Admin user management page for inviting new admin users with email and password. Displays a table of existing admin invitations with their status and creation dates.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ChatManagementP: Chat management interface for admins to view customer messages grouped by email and send replies. Includes expandable customer conversation threads with reply functionality.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LogoManagementP: Logo management page allowing admins to upload and update the company logo with image preview, file validation, and upload progress tracking using ExternalBlob.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProjectManageme: Project management page for adding, editing, and deleting projects with title, description, category (ServiceType), and image upload. Includes dialog forms and image preview functionality.
frontend/src/pages/admin/QuotationManage: Admin page for managing quotation requests with functionality to add pricing details, approve quotations, and respond to customer negotiations through dialog forms and tables.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryInfoPage.tsx: Delivery information page displaying service area (35km radius) and interactive delivery fee calculator based on distance input.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page with hero section, feature cards (quality, speed, design, pricing), and call-to-action buttons for requesting quotes and viewing the gallery. Includes pull-to-refresh and swipe navigation functionality.
frontend/src/pages/MyQuotationsPage.tsx: Displays a list of user's quotation requests with status badges, project details, and action buttons. Shows office location when quotations are accepted and includes skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectGalleryPage.ts: Gallery page showing completed projects with category filtering (all, digital, banner, offset, design). Features pull-to-refresh, swipe navigation, and skeleton loading states for project cards.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationConfirmation: Success confirmation page displayed after submitting a quotation request, showing the request ID and explaining the next steps in the quotation approval and notification process.
Form page for submitting new quotation requests with fields for service type, deadline, project details, mobile number, and email. Includes validation and haptic feedback on submission.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationResponsePage: Page for authenticated users to view and respond to their quotations with options to accept, reject, or negotiate, including a negotiation history dialog. Displays login prompt for unauthenticated users and uses hooks for quotation data fetching and response mutations.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Static page displaying four main service categories (Digital Printing, Flex & Banner, Offset Printing, Creative Design) with descriptions, features, and icons. Includes pull-to-refresh and swipe navigation support with a CTA button linking to the quotation request page.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitReviewPage.tsx: Form page for submitting customer reviews with fields for name, rating (1-5 stars), review text, project type selection, and optional image upload with progress tracking. Handles image validation, blob storage upload, and navigates to testimonials page on success.
frontend/src/pages/TestimonialsPage.tsx: Page displaying customer reviews with a sticky rating filter (all/5/4/3/2/1 stars) and pull-to-refresh functionality. Shows review cards with star ratings, customer names, project types, and optional images in a responsive grid layout.
frontend/src/utils/haptics.ts: Utility module providing haptic feedback functions (tap, success, error, select) using the browser Vibration API with support detection.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: URL parameter parsing utilities supporting both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence for parameters like admin tokens.
frontend/src/utils/webauthn.ts: WebAuthn utility functions for biometric authentication including registration, authentication flows, and ArrayBuffer/Base64 conversion helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH, extended theme settings for typography, animations, and component styling with plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document defining the Nellore Print Hub business website architecture, including manual quotation workflow, payment integration, delivery system, and comprehensive feature list with requirements tracking.
